# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud database security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_database_security

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      transparentDataEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      transparentDataEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      databaseEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      autoGrowth: "Disabled"
      maxLogSizeBytes: 1073741824
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      serviceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      elasticPoolName: "[parameters('elasticPoolName')]"
      readScale: "Disabled"
      backupRetentionPeriodDays: 7
      maxDatabaseSizeBytes: 2147483648
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      transparentDataEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      databaseEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      autoGrowth: "Disabled"
      maxLogSizeBytes: 1073741824
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      serviceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      elasticPoolName: "[parameters('elasticPoolName')]"
      readScale: "Disabled"
      backupRetentionPeriodDays: 7
      maxDatabaseSizeBytes: 2147483648
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"

    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      transparentDataEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      databaseEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      autoGrowth: "Disabled"
      maxLogSizeBytes: 1073741824
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      serviceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      elasticPoolName: "[parameters('elasticPoolName')]"
      readScale: "Disabled"
      backupRetentionPeriodDays: 7
      maxDatabaseSizeBytes: 2147483648
      defaultSecondaryLocation: "[resourceGroup().location]"
      createMode: "Default"
      sampleName: "AdventureWorksLT"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      maxDatabaseSizeBytes: 2147483648
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', 'sqlserver')]"

apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
name: "sqlserver"
type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
properties:
  administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
  administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLoginPassword')]"
  version: "12.0"
  minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
  publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled"
  administrators:
    administratorType: "ActiveDirectory"
    login: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorLogin')]"
    sid: "[parameters('sqlAdministratorSid')]"
resources:
  - name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    type: "databases"
    apiVersion: 2020-02-02-preview
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    properties:
      collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      edition: "Basic"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "Basic"
      backupStorageRedundancy: "Local"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readReplicaCount: 0
      transparentDataEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      databaseEncryption:
        status: "Enabled"
      autoGrowth: "Disabled"
      maxLogSizeBytes: 1
